<Badge text="microsoft-azure-skills-all" variant="note" /> <Badge text="23 words" variant="default" /> <Badge text="Avoid default" variant="danger" /> <Badge text="global-only-or-avoid" variant="default" />

> massive Azure bundle; cherry-pick only if a concrete need appears — do not bulk-promote.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add microsoft/azure-skills --skill microsoft-azure-skills-all -y -g
```

**Use:** `/microsoft-azure-skills-all`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Source & provenance">
This page is generated from curated config (`docs/src/authoring/skills/microsoft-azure-skills-all.mdx`) and local inventory when installed.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets all supported agent harnesses via the install command below.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add microsoft/azure-skills --skill microsoft-azure-skills-all -y -g
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Avoid default** (`global-only-or-avoid`)

Curated status: `global-only-or-avoid`

Risk notes: massive Azure bundle; cherry-pick only if a concrete need appears — do not bulk-promote.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

microsoft/azure-skills (official Microsoft). Massive bundle covering many Azure topics (compute, prepare, upgrade, validate, reliability, entra, functions etc) via SKILL.md + references/global-rules. Intended for AI coding agents to have real Azure expertise. Per catalog: do not bulk-promote; cherry-pick only if concrete need.

## Install Prerequisites

npx skills add microsoft/azure-skills (but keep global-only; avoid bulk in curated install-now); status=keep-global-only-or-avoid.

## Upstream Maintainer

[microsoft/azure-skills](https://github.com/microsoft/azure-skills) (official).

## Comparable Alternatives

Focused Azure sub-skills; other cloud provider skills (e.g. if exist).

&gt; Evidence from GitHub (mcp-use, microsoft, neondatabase 2026) + catalog; research evidence only - not authority or endorsement.
